body:
Hotfix for Android Bugfixes: * Fix uninitialized variables which can cause crashes (#760 #838, Battery, Android) * Don't detect hyfetch as shell when used as backend of [hyfetch](https://github.com/hykilpikonna/hyfetch) * Fix incorrect information in man page (#828) Features: * Support sorcery package manager detection (Packages, Linux) * Make `--custom-format` optional (Custom) * Make `/` an alias of `C:\` for `--disk-folders` (Disk, Windows) * Build for Linux armv7 Logo: * Fix colors of Source Mage logo ---
